test-method.name: yatra_search_flight
test-method.description: Yatra - Search flight and get cheapest flight for given n days

param.value: {cabinClass=Economy, travellers=1,1,1, daysToCheck=5, from=Boston, to=Amsterdam, depart=today+1, return=today+9}

exception.message: Index 1 out of bounds for length 0

test-method.name: yatra_search_flight
test-method.description: Yatra - Search flight and get cheapest flight for given n days

param.value: {cabinClass=Premium Economy, travellers=2,2,1, daysToCheck=6, from=Boston, to=Amsterdam, depart=today+10, return=today+month}

exception.message: Element not found or not visible: By.xpath: //div[@class='month-name full' and contains(text(),'Jul 2026')]/..//span[@class='full date-val' and text()='5']
exception.full-stacktrace: java.lang.RuntimeException: Element not found or not visible: By.xpath: //div[@class='month-name full' and contains(text(),'Jul 2026')]/..//span[@class='full date-val' and text()='5'] at utils.Element.getElement(Element.java:47) at utils.Element.click(Element.java:34) at yatra.pages.YatraSearchResultsPage.clickDate(YatraSearchResultsPage.java:107) at test-method.name: yatra_search_flight
test-method.description: Yatra - Search flight and get cheapest flight for given n days

param.value: {cabinClass=Economy, travellers=1,1,1, daysToCheck=5, from=Boston, to=Amsterdam, depart=today+1, return=today+9}

test-method.name: yatra_search_flight
test-method.description: Yatra - Search flight and get cheapest flight for given n days

param.value: {cabinClass=Premium Economy, travellers=2,2,1, daysToCheck=6, from=Boston, to=Amsterdam, depart=today+10, return=today+month}

test-method.description: Yatra - Search flight and get cheapest flight for given n days
